title: Receptor
description: Schema for Receptor Ascriptions — input endpoint of a Mechanism. Defines the owning Mechanism and the data Archetype that types the input payload. DM input = DM output (1:1). Extensible — tenant-defined archetypes MAY extend Receptor via allOf to add domain-specific port vocabulary while inheriting the base port schema.

mechanism.description: ID reference to the owning Mechanism. A Receptor cannot exist without a Mechanism.

archetype.description: ID reference to the data Archetype that types the Receptor's input payload. To change the data type, author a new Definition.
